The bottleneck isn't the market. It's you staying in the middle of everything.

items.title: Your Beliefs Are Not the Truth
items.snippet:
Just because you believe something doesn’t make it true.

The story you repeat becomes the belief you act from — and that belief decides what you’re willing to do next.

#TonyRobbins #Beliefs #Mindset #PersonalDevelopment

items.title: The Reason You’re Successful But Not Happy
items.snippet:

You can master success and still feel disconnected from joy if happiness isn’t something you value, practice, and prioritize every day.

#TonyRobbins #Happiness #Fulfillment

items.title: Your Brain Is Lying to You
items.snippet:
You don’t experience life exactly as it is — you experience the life you focus on.

Your brain distorts, deletes, and generalizes constantly. Change your focus, and you can change what you feel in an instant.

#TonyRobbins #Mindset #Focus
